criteria.accept: Exact taxon, cultivar, variety or colour form; botanical/scientific illustration; legally reusable with clear rights.
criteria.reject: Photographs, related-species substitutions, wrong colour forms, modern artwork with unclear rights.

rejections.candidate: General web and Wikimedia searches under Vachellia erioloba / Acacia erioloba
rejections.reason: No exact reusable botanical plate located; results were photographs, unrelated acacias, or modern drawings with unclear rights.

rejections.candidate: National Tropical Botanical Garden botanical illustration
rejections.reason: Exact scientific illustration, but modern image rights are not clearly reusable; page is copyright NTBG.

rejections.candidate: General web, Wikimedia and botanical-plate searches
rejections.reason: No exact legally reusable botanical illustration located.

rejections.candidate: General web, Wikimedia and botanical-plate searches
rejections.reason: Searches returned photographs or taxonomic pages; no exact reusable scientific illustration located.
